docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ADELAIDA RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CONFORTI DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONFORTI DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADELAIDA RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONFORTI DAVID $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.00, THIS REPRESENTS THE TOTAL AMT OWED TO PLFT, CLEAN- ING, SECURITY DEPOSIT, INT FOR OVER 5 YRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CONFORTI DAVID
